title: Rail factsheet: 2024
body: " Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to. You are welcome to contact us directly by emailing rail statistics with any comments about how we meet these standards.   The rail factsheet for 2024 provides an overview of key statistics on national rail in Great Britain. These statistics relate to the national rail network, so do not include underground, light rail and tram systems.  Contact us  Rail statistics enquiries     Email rail.stats@dft.gov.uk     Media enquiries 0300 7777 878       To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTstats.  "
